# Local API Adapter Scope

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providerintegrationgatedocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to integration gates](../integration-gates.md)

`internal/riidoapi` owns the local IPC envelope and transport for daemon-local integrations.

- The local API supports Unix socket and Windows named-pipe transport surfaces.
- It calls public task DB guarded mutation and validation APIs.
- Provider runtime execution and remote server HTTP/SSE transport remain outside this local API adapter.
